data.summary: Insufficient evidence to validate the requirement for event trail for previews/downloads.
data.assessment: The exploratory step aimed to validate the requirement for an 'event trail for previews/downloads', which is explicitly mentioned in the linked use case. However, there is no evidence provided in the prior steps that confirms the existence or proper implementation of this event trail. The absence of any related evidence indicates a clear gap in meeting the requirement, leading to an inconclusive result.
gaps: Missing evidence for event trail for previews/downloads.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
